name: Spotlight Input
description: Input field with cursor-tracking border glow. Hover shows radial gradient border, focus shows rotating conic gradient rainbow border with outer glow shadow. Includes typing sparkle particles and submit shockwave explosion.
accessibility_notes: sparkle/shockwave is decorative — canvas is pointer-events: none

onSubmit.description: Callback with input value on form submit

onFocusChange.description: Optional callback when focus state changes

loading.description: Disable input and button when loading

conflicts: canvas overlay may intercept clicks if z-index misconfigured
conic-gradient border not supported in older browsers
sparkle position assumes monospace-like character width
usage_tip: Best for hero CTA inputs or newsletter signups; desktop only.
